text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mu-mun... I just can't get my skin back to
normal... What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: At times like this, I've gotta call up the master!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Mom? How're things going at home? Yeah,
I'm fine. So actually, the reason I'm calling is—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Mom, I'm studying hard and always finish my
homework. So, anyway, I want to ask about ski—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I got it. You take care too. Say hi to
everyone for me. Bye. Love you too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hang on! I didn't even get to ask her about
skincare!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Matikanetannhauser is struggling in her
search for an effective skincare method.
